okf.description: Exposes agricultural ontology and knowledge graph query tools.

rag.description: Exposes semantic search tools over agronomy manuals and documents.

weather.description: Exposes local weather forecast and microclimate analysis tools.

market.description: Exposes crop pricing, supply charts, and financial tools.

image_analysis.description: Exposes multimodal image diagnostics for plant disease identification.

tts.description: Exposes text-to-speech tools for audio farmer readouts.

stt.description: Exposes speech-to-text transcription tools for voice queries.

translation.description: Exposes Gemini-driven translation services for multilingual farmer queries.
